composio_raw.name: Vercel
composio_raw.description: Vercel is a platform for frontend frameworks and static sites, enabling developers to host websites and web services that deploy instantly, scale automatically, and require minimal configuration.

llm_raw.description: A cloud platform for static sites and Serverless Functions that enables developers to host, deploy, and scale web applications.
llm_raw.notes: Vercel uses Bearer Token authentication (Personal Access Tokens) for its extensive REST API. The documentation is located at /docs/api rather than the fetched /docs/rest-api.
